content.title: Pool Decks & Surrounds
content.tagline: Beautiful, Functional, and Built to Cool Your Summer
content.subtitle: Slip-resistant, weather-tough pool decks crafted from decorative concrete and pavers — designed to complement your pool and elevate your outdoor living. Free consultation available.

content.title: A Pool Deck That Transforms
content.ctaText: Inspired? Let's Build Your Pool Deck
content.subtitle: Your pool deserves a setting as stunning as the water itself. From classic broom finishes to elegant pavers and stamped designs, Maxima Concrete creates pool decks that are cool to the touch, safe to walk on, and built to handle every Ohio season.
content.paragraph1: At Maxima Concrete, we design pool surrounds that blend beauty, safety, and longevity. Our team works with you from concept to finish — choosing slip-resistant textures, heat-reflective colors, and durable materials that complement your pool, landscaping, and lifestyle. The result: a backyard space you'll love for decades.

content.title:
Why Maxima Is the Right 
Choice for Your Pool Deck

items.text: Built to withstand pool chemicals, freeze-thaw cycles, and constant moisture for decades of performance.
items.label: High-Strength Mix (6.5-Bag Concrete):

items.text: Broom, exposed aggregate, and stamped textures give wet feet the grip they need around the pool.
items.label: Textured Finishes:

items.text: Light tones and decorative finishes keep your deck comfortable on the hottest summer days.
items.label: Heat-Reflective Colors:

items.text: A beautifully finished pool deck elevates curb appeal and increases your property value.

content.description: Our pool decks combine strength, slip resistance, and timeless style. Whether you want a sleek modern surround or a warm, natural retreat, we build it cool to the touch and made to last through every Ohio season.

content.title: Pool Deck Finish Options

styles.title: Broom-Finished
styles.description: Subtle texture with great slip resistance. A classic, durable, low-maintenance choice.

styles.title: Stamped & Colored
styles.description: Mimics stone, brick or wood with rich color and texture for a premium look.

styles.title: Exposed Aggregate
styles.description: Bold, textured surface revealing decorative stones — slip-resistant and natural.

styles.title: Buff Wash
styles.description: Soft exposure of sand and fine aggregates for a refined, natural finish.

content.description: Maxima Concrete offers a diverse range of finishes and textures designed for safety, comfort, and style around your pool:

content.title:
Pool Decks That Turn Your 
Backyard Into a Resort
content.description:
A pool deck is more than a surface — it sets the tone for your entire backyard escape. At Maxima Concrete, we combine artistry and engineering to design pool surrounds that blend natural beauty with long-lasting strength.

From decorative concrete to elegant pavers in cool, light tones, we craft layouts that complement your pool, landscape, and home. Whether it is a sleek modern surround or a warm Mediterranean feel, we bring your vision to life with precision and care.

content.title:
Our Commitment
to Quality

benefits.title: 6.5-Bag Mix Concrete
benefits.description: Stronger and denser for a durable foundation.

benefits.title: Fiber Mesh Reinforcement
benefits.description: Reduces cracking and adds internal strength.

benefits.title: 10-Gauge Wire Mesh
benefits.description: Provides superior stability and long-term support.

benefits.title: Full-Service Experience
benefits.description: From consultation to final finish — we handle it all.

content.description:
We build every project with precision 
and care — ensuring structural integrity and beauty that lasts.

When you choose Maxima Concrete, you’re choosing reliability, craftsmanship, and peace of mind.

content.bottomText: Licensed & Insured · Free Estimates · We Handle All Permits
content.description: Your dream pool deck is within reach. From the initial design consultation to the final touch, we are with you every step of the way to ensure a smooth process and a result you will love.

items.answer: Most projects are completed in 3-7 days depending on size, finish, and site conditions.
items.question: How long does a concrete pool deck installation take?

items.answer: Yes. We use textured finishes such as broom, exposed aggregate, and stamped concrete to provide safe footing even when wet.
items.question: Are your pool decks slip-resistant?

items.answer: We recommend light-colored or heat-reflective finishes that significantly reduce surface temperature on hot, sunny days.
items.question: Will the surface stay cool in summer?

items.answer: Absolutely. We offer stamped, colored, broom-finished, exposed aggregate, and paver options tailored to your pool and home style.
items.question: Can I customize the color, pattern, and texture?

items.answer: Foot traffic is usually safe after 24-48 hours, with full cure in about 7 days before heavy use.
items.question: How soon can I use my pool deck after installation?

items.answer: Yes — we provide free on-site consultations and design estimates anywhere in Central Ohio.
items.question: Do you offer free consultations?
